projects.name: VA Seattle Spinal – Roof Replacement & Plaza TPO Waterproofing
projects.description:
Scope of Work
• Install new TPO roofing systems on Upper SCI&D; Roof (8,041 SF) and Lower Plaza Roof (1,860 SF)
under pavers.
• Prepare concrete deck surfaces; apply compatible primer and self-adhered vapor barrier where required.
• Install 2" flat ISO base insulation adhered in low-rise foam; multiple tapered ISO layers (X/Y) and
step-fills per slope plan (¼" per foot, ½" crickets).
• Install DensDeck/protection board as specified.
• Install 60-mil TPO membrane, fully adhered with heat-welded seams.
• Flash all penetrations, curbs, and walls (up 8"); coordinate/tie-in at expansion joints (Balco FCWWE by
GC).
• Install 100 LF of TPO walk pads (field-installed).
• Provide cleanup and debris removal via dumpster.

projects.name: Valley View Elementary - Transitional Kindergarten Bldg 2
Brian Dougherty - 1711 Tenth St, Berkeley, CA 94710
projects.description:
In the heart of Berkeley, California, Brian Dougherty found himself facing a pressing challenge: his beloved home at 1711 Tenth St had seen better days, with an aging roof that not only detracted from its charm but also posed risks to the integrity of the entire structure. With the threat of leaks and deterioration looming overhead, Brian sought a solution that would not only restore his roof but elevate it to a new standard of durability and aesthetic appeal. He turned to our roofing team, known for our commitment to excellence and expertise in metal roofing systems.

With a clear vision in mind, we embarked on an ambitious transformation. The project began with the installation of a robust lumber grid system over the existing shingles, ensuring a solid foundation for the new zinc roofing materials. Our skilled technicians meticulously laid down GAF Tiger Paw synthetic underlayment, creating an effective barrier against moisture while allowing for proper ventilation. As we progressed, the real magic unfolded with the installation of stunning standing seam metal panels, meticulously crafted and secured to create an elegant, modern finish that would withstand the test of time. Each component, from the drip edges to the custom flashings, was designed to not only enhance the roof’s functionality but also to harmonize with the architectural beauty of the home.

The result was a stunning transformation that left Brian and his family beaming with satisfaction. The new roof not only provided peace of mind with its superior durability but also added a striking visual appeal that turned heads in the neighborhood. With efficient water management through expertly installed gutters and downspouts, Brian’s home was now equipped to handle the elements with grace. This project stands as a testament to the power of quality materials and expert craftsmanship, proving that investing in a well-executed roofing solution can breathe new life into any home. For homeowners seeking a reliable and transformative roofing experience, our team is here to turn challenges into triumphs, one roof at a time.
